since_last: 55% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.05%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 55% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.00% · BTC +0.38% · Gold +1.10% · Nasdaq100 +0.37%. 55% of 85 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.05%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.05%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -1.54%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: VRT is the standout at +7.34%
cards.body: Leaders: VRT +7.34%, SMR +6.98%, AMAT +6.83%, ARM +6.72%, OKLO +6.35%. Laggards: APP -4.36%, AI -4.21%, SNAP -3.68%, META -3.58%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.55% at $194.63
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.55% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
